mapper.sql: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.email, u.phone, u.age, u.gender, u.create_time, u.update_time, u.status, u.level, u.parent_id, u.org_id, u.role_code, u.enterprise_id, u.company_id, u.dept_id, r.role_name, r.data_scope, r.menu_perms, o.org_name FROM user u LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_code = u.role_code LEFT JOIN sys_org o ON o.id = u.org_id
mapper.update:
UPDATE user
password = #{password},
email = #{email},
level = #{level},
parent_id = #{parentId},
phone = #{phone},
age = #{age},
gender = #{gender},
status = #{status},
org_id = #{orgId},
role_code = #{roleCode},
enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId},
company_id = #{companyId},
dept_id = #{deptId},
update_time = #{updateTime}
WHERE id = #{id}
